name: Molina's Mexico City Restaurants' Carrot and Onion Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the carrot slices at the bottom of a saucepan.
2. Add onion slices, jalapeño, garlic, salt, and pepper on top of the carrots.
3. Pour enough white vinegar into the pan to cover the vegetables.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low and simmer until all vegetables are cooked through.
Note: Rose Mary Molina provided this recipe for carrot and onion relish from her restaurants. It can be served as an appetizer, mixed with boiled shrimp as an appetizer, or used as a sandwich relish.
